conversation.text_en: Hi, I'm your therapist. Everything we discuss here is confidential, so please feel comfortable.
Thanks, I appreciate that.
Great! So, how has your week been? Any notable events or changes?
Oh, just the usual stuff. Work's been keeping me busy, trying to get some projects done on time.
That sounds like a lot on your plate. How's work as an electrician treating you?
It's fine, I guess. Just getting used to being back at it after the winter break.
Ah, nice! So, what do you like most about being an electrician?
Um, I don't know... probably just the sense of accomplishment when a job is done right.
That's great! Do you have any friends or family that are close by in Seattle?
Yeah, my sister lives around here. We grab coffee every few weeks.
Nice! What about sleep? Are you getting enough rest?
Honestly? I'm sleeping just fine. Maybe a little too much, actually.
That's interesting. And how's your energy level been lately?
It's been... meh. I mean, some days are better than others.
Okay! Have you noticed any changes in your mood or emotional state recently?
Nah, nothing too out of the ordinary. Just feeling a bit down sometimes, like everyone does, right?
That makes sense. How's your appetite been doing?
To be honest? I've just lost my taste for food lately.
Okay, that can be tough. What about hobbies or activities you enjoy? Are you finding time for those?
Yeah, trying to squeeze in some guitar practice here and there.
That's great! How's your concentration been lately? Any challenges with focus or decision-making?
Honestly? Sometimes I feel like I'm just going through the motions without much thought.
Okay. What about physical sensations or body feelings you've noticed recently? Any aches or pains?
Just general fatigue, I guess. Like my body's running on fumes sometimes.
Okay! Have there been any recent stressful life events or changes that might be contributing to these symptoms?
Not really... just the usual adulting stuff: bills, responsibilities.
Got it. What kind of support system do you have in place? Any friends, family, or resources that help you cope?
Yeah, my sister's been a big help. And I try to exercise sometimes too.
That's great! Finally, what are some goals or things you'd like to work on during our sessions together?
Um... maybe getting more energy and motivation back? I feel like I'm just stuck right now.
Okay! Well, we can definitely explore ways to boost your energy levels. And remember, everything discussed here is confidential, so please don't hesitate to share anything that comes up.
Alright, sounds good.
One more thing – do you have any idea what might be causing these symptoms for you?
Honestly? I'm not really sure. It just feels like my body's been run down or something.
That makes sense. Let's continue to explore this further and develop a plan to help you feel better. We'll get started with that in our next session.
Sounds good.
And finally, is there anything else you'd like to add before we wrap up today?
Just... thanks for listening, I guess. It feels nice to talk about this stuff.
You're welcome! Remember, everything discussed here is confidential and safe. Take care of yourself until our next session!
Yeah, okay. Thanks again.
